_comment: Schema for applicant_profile.json. Copy to applicant_profile.json (gitignored) and fill with real data. Consumed by cover_letter.py (cover letter generation) and apply.py (assisted form auto-fill — opens the ATS form, pre-fills fields, pauses for human review and submit). Fields marked REQUIRED FOR COVER LETTER must be present or cover_letter.py will exit with a clear error.

work_authorization.eu_eea_switzerland: Authorized to work without sponsorship (EU citizen).

work_history.title: Intern, ...
work_history.description: 2-4 sentences, used verbatim in ATS experience entries.

_cover_letter_fields_comment: The three fields below are REQUIRED FOR COVER LETTER generation (cover_letter.py). Without them the script exits with a clear error. They are injected into the system prompt and the profile-facts block.
career_narrative: lead with [most relevant experience, e.g. internship title and firm] and [secondary experience], tied to what the specific role needs
availability_narrative: Describe current status and when available for full-time roles, e.g. 'an incoming MSc ... student at ... (starts Sept YYYY, finishes mid-YYYY) and is targeting graduate / junior roles starting around mid-YYYY. State availability accordingly unless the role specifies otherwise.'
